_comment: BrainPalace setup permissions. Copy to .claude/settings.json in your project root, or /brainpalace-setup will write it automatically.
_comment_group2: Group 2: Detection and read-only environment checks (lsof, ollama, docker, ps, pgrep, du)
_comment_group3: Group 3: Configuration writes and file operations (mkdir, cat, jq, mv)
_comment_group4: Group 4: Installation tools (pip, pipx, uv, python, python3)
_comment_group5: Group 5: Standard development tools already common (rg, wc, curl, ls, find, chmod, grep, bash)
